title: Targeted phishing and credential theft against CNI operators
recommended_mitigation: Revoke active sessions, isolate compromised workstation only after dependency check, and rotate privileged credentials.
india_context: Indian power-sector operator with legacy Windows endpoints and a narrow IT-to-OT gateway dependency.

title: Hospital ransomware precursors after phishing compromise
recommended_mitigation: Prioritize service continuity, disable compromised accounts, and preserve clinical system access.
india_context: AIIMS-like hospital continuity scenario where isolation must not interrupt patient care.

title: Exam-board data exfiltration and cloud API enumeration
recommended_mitigation: Block suspicious API tokens, snapshot evidence, and lock bulk export paths.
india_context: CBSE-like public examination data scenario with executive impact from data integrity loss.

title: OT historian gateway abuse and unsafe PLC command attempts
recommended_mitigation: Increase passive OT monitoring, alert operators, move to degraded mode, and require approval before gateway isolation.
india_context: Power-grid IT-to-OT bridge pivot with end-of-life control infrastructure constraints.
